segment.source: A grid of location cards, each showing a city with optional address, phone, email, and a directions button. Use it on a contact or about page to present multiple offices or branches and make each reachable. Each card requires a city and optionally takes an address, a tappable phone number, a clickable email, and a map link rendered as a "Directions to" button; an intro heading and sub-headline sit above the grid.
